sql: WITH t AS ( SELECT strategy_id s, entry_drift_pct d, net_sol FROM copy_trades WHERE status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL AND entry_drift_pct IS NOT NULL AND strategy_id IN ('copy-tp100-sl30-lag','copy-hotlead-strict','copy-hotlead-hold30m') ) SELECT s, CASE WHEN d < -5 THEN 'a_lt-5' WHEN d < -2 THEN 'b_-5..-2' WHEN d < 0 THEN 'c_-2..0' WHEN d < 2 THEN 'd_0..2' WHEN d < 5 THEN 'e_2..5' ELSE 'f_5..10' END bkt, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(net_sol),2) net, ROUND(AVG(net_sol),4) avg_net, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net_sol>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END),3) wr FROM t GROUP BY s, bkt ORDER BY s, bkt
